description: Production Shadow Eval — paired queries that simulate what the BaZi/Forecast UI actually sends to the retrieval pipeline.
purpose: Quantifies the offline-vs-production query rewriting gap (see docs/BENCHMARK_REPORT.md appendix and README known limitations). The production BaZi flow prepends an English wrapper that may pollute the HyDE hypothetical-document step, which is designed for pure Chinese classical questions.
treatment_template: BaZi analysis for someone born on {birth_date}, gender: {gender}. {original_question}
scoring_rubric: GPT-4o scores retrieval quality 1-5 against the underlying Chinese intent (1=irrelevant, 5=highly relevant). Mean delta reported.

pairs.original: 阳刃格使用官杀时有哪些特殊考量？
什么是正财格？如何判断一个八字是否构成正财格？
在《滴天髓》中，用神和忌神的判断标准是什么？
七杀格的喜忌有哪些？什么情况下需要制化？
如何根据日主强弱判断格局成败？
在传统命理学中，孤辰寡宿具体指什么？如何根据命盘推断？
比肩与劫财在八字中的吉凶判断有何区别？
印绶格如何取用神？身弱和身旺时的处理有何不同？
食神制杀格成立的条件是什么？
壬申癸酉剑锋金的特性如何？在与其他五行相遇时有哪些喜忌？
